name: Mexico Area Family YMCA
description: Mexico Area Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Mexico, MO. There are 7 courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
